detaileddescription.para: Digest is an implementation- and usage-defined entity, for example, information, needed to verify the block
SuperGenius primitive, which is opaque representation of RuntimeMetadata

briefdescription.para: ValidatorId primitive is an ed25519 or sr25519 public key.

detaileddescription.para: Information on a transaction's validity and, if valid, on how it relate to other transactions.
